lint.output: npm run lint — 0 errors, 13 warnings (all pre-existing: journey-canvas-view hook deps x2 per worktree + sidebar unused Plus import). Same warnings exist in build-2 and main.

build.output: npm run build — Compiled successfully in 5.0s. 0 errors. Note: /w/[workspaceId]/comments route is present in the worktree but not shown in build output because the build runs from the main stride/ project root (worktree src/ is gitignored by autonomous-dev/.gitignore). The route will be active after merge to main.

unit_tests.output: No unit tests exist for these components

notes: FlowCanvas (flow-canvas.tsx) is not in files_owned, so cannot be modified to pass commentCount as a prop. Solved via React Context (CommentCountsContext exported from canvas.ts). Canvas views (canvas-view.tsx, journey-canvas-view.tsx) fetch all unresolved top-level comments once and provide the context; all 4 node types consume the context directly. Badge placed at bottom-right to avoid collision with the annotation dot at top-right. Comments page uses server fetch from Supabase + client-side category filtering. Sidebar now has Comments nav item between Compare and Teams; Workflows active() updated to exclude /comments path.
